locale_specific_quirks.en-GB: DMY date format, £ prefix (vs en-US ambiguity)
locale_specific_quirks.ru-RU: currency SUFFIX placement (₽ after number with NBSP), DMY with dot separator, comma decimal
locale_specific_quirks.ja-JP-gregorian: YMD with kanji separators, JPY no decimals
locale_specific_quirks.ja-JP-imperial: Imperial era opt-in via user.useImperialEra setting, era table lookup with boundary handling (平成→令和 at 2019-05-01)
locale_specific_quirks.ar-SA: RTL direction, Arabic-Indic digits, bidi isolation (U+2068 FSI / U+2069 PDI) required around numeric runs

_meta.notes: ja-JP split into 2 rows because useImperialEra setting is documented as variant axis sub-divider, not orthogonal. ar-SA carries 2 scenarios (Outline + dedicated bidi-edge) because RTL handling is the primary regression risk and Outline parametrization can't capture mixed-direction paragraph assertion cleanly.
